title: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Consultant Physician to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!
